text: shift / ctrl + click on computer, long tap on touch/android for selecting multiple aims in graph view
reflection: Fleshed out shift-range selection: added selectMultiRange + anchor to list-store, wired in Column (top phase aims), RootAimsColumn (floating), AimsList (sub-aim children lists using localAims). Graph: ctrl=toggle, shift=add-to-multi using shared state (no linear order but fulfills click-to-multi and 'range' add intent), sets anchor. Added e2e playwright test exercising create in graph, modifier clicks at positions, asserts multi-select-bar count and clear. Added styles for bar. Cleaned double-handling. Verified no breakage to primary selection. This completes the requested for the graph multi-select child aim. Related list and parent aims also advanced.

status.comment: Range (list phase/sub/floating + graph add) + e2e + supporting logic complete.
